summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Elevideo SaaS video processing app with premium design features. All core functionality working correctly including login/register pages, theme toggle, form validation, responsive design, and CSS animations/effects.

ui_bugs.issue: Keyboard navigation (Tab) doesn't focus properly on first form input (email field)

design_issues.issue: Minor JavaScript error in className.split function during animation detection (doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: Login page renders with premium design (gradients, glassmorphism)
Register page renders with password strength indicators
Theme toggle works on login/register pages
Form validation works correctly on login and register
Navigation redirects to login if not authenticated
Mobile responsive design works across breakpoints (320px to 1920px)
CSS animations and effects are applied (floating, gradients, blur)
CSS custom properties and theme consistency
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor accessibility improvement: Fix keyboard navigation (Tab order) to properly focus on first form input. Consider adding tabindex attributes to form elements for better accessibility.

success_percentage.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing per request
